cards.prompt: Две перегрузки Describe(object)/Describe(string); object o="hi"; Describe(o) и Describe("hi") — что печатают?
cards.code: using System; static string Describe(object x) => "object overload"; static string Describe(string x) => "string overload"; object o = "hi"; Console.WriteLine(Describe(o)); Console.WriteLine(Describe("hi"));

cards.prompt: Animal a = new Dog(); a.ToString() и a.GetType().Name — что печатают?
cards.code: using System; class Animal { public override string ToString()=>"Animal"; } class Dog: Animal { public override string ToString()=>"Dog"; } Animal a = new Dog(); Console.WriteLine(a.ToString()); Console.WriteLine(a.GetType().Name);
